    <item>
      <title>Cooper Flagg puts facing LeBron James in perspective after latest matchup  </title>
      <description>From the moment he entered the NBA as a teenager, Cooper Flagg has been compared to LeBron James. Now as he's nearing the end of his historic rookie season, those comparisons have only intensified. The rookie reflected on playing against James after Sunday's Mavericks-Lakers matchup.</description>
      <pubDate>06 Apr 2026 09:07:07 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/cooper_flagg_puts_facing_lebron_james_in_perspective_after_latest_matchup/s1_13132_43692557</link>

        <media:title> Dallas Mavericks forward Cooper Flagg. </media:title>
      </media:content>

    <item>
      <title>Insider shares latest on return timelines for Lakers' Luka Doncic, Austin Reaves</title>
      <description>The Los Angeles Lakers hit a brutal stretch last Thursday, and the timing could not be worse. Both Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves went down with injuries during a 139-96 blowout loss to the Oklahoma City Thunder.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Eventful Monday leaves Bulls' Billy Donovan in limbo</title>
      <description>Two big events on Monday should have a big effect on Billy Donovan's future. The Chicago Bulls fired Donovan's boss, executive vice president Arturas Karnisovas, and then the University of North Carolina hired Michael Malone as their new head coach.</description>
      <pubDate>06 Apr 2026 22:51:24 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/eventful_monday_leaves_bulls_billy_donovan_in_limbo/s1_13132_43695023</link>

        <media:credit> Kamil Krzaczynski-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Chicago Bulls head coach Billy Donovan. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Chicago Bulls</category>
      <category>Arturas Karnisovas</category>

    </item>

    <item>
      <title>Record shooting night can't help Grizzlies break losing streak</title>
      <description>No NBA team has ever made more three-pointers in a game than the Memphis Grizzlies did Monday night. Unlike the other teams that sank 27 or more threes, the Grizzlies couldn't win the game.</description>
      <pubDate>07 Apr 2026 00:08:23 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/record_shooting_night_cant_help_grizzlies_break_losing_streak/s1_13132_43695560</link>

    <item>
      <title>Is Nuggets superstar Nikola Jokic still the best player on the planet?</title>
      <description>Let’s get this out of the way: Oklahoma City Thunder Shai Gilgeous-Alexander should win NBA MVP. He’s putting up 30 a game on absurd efficiency, his Thunder have lapped the field and he’s the most reliable closer in the league.</description>
      <pubDate>07 Apr 2026 01:05:37 -0400</pubDate>

        <media:credit> Scott Wachter-Imagn Images </media:credit>

    <item>
      <title>Mavericks' Cooper Flagg joins exclusive club with another monster game</title>
      <description>Cooper Flagg is making a pretty big statement in his quest for the NBA's Rookie of the Year Award. After scoring 51 points for the Dallas Mavericks in their loss to the Orlando Magic on Friday night, he followed it up with a 45-point effort in a 134-128 win over the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday. </description>

        <media:credit> Kevin Jairaj-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Dallas Mavericks forward Cooper Flagg (32) reacts after scoring against the Los Angeles Lakers during the second half at American Airlines Center. </media:title>
      </media:content>

      <category>Cooper Flagg</category>

      <title>JJ Redick outlines Lakers' plan amid Luka Doncic, Austin Reaves injuries</title>

    <item>
      <title>Jason Kidd doubles down after Mark Cuban's comments on Luka Doncic trade</title>
      <description>The fallout from the Luka Doncic-Anthony Davis trade with the Los Angeles Lakers and Dallas Mavericks in 2025 is still happening.</description>
      <pubDate>06 Apr 2026 12:44:07 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/jason_kidd_doubles_down_after_mark_cubans_comments_on_luka_doncic_trade/s1_127_43683716</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/jason_kidd_doubles_down_after_mark_cubans_comments_on_luka_doncic_trade/s1_127_43683716</guid>
      <author>Matt Wadleigh, Larry Brown Sports</author>

    <item>
      <title>Nuggets' Nikola Jokic joins elite company with performance vs. Spurs</title>
      <description>Before Victor Wembanyama took the NBA by storm, the league was marveling over the dominance of Nikola Jokic. And on Saturday night, the veteran legend made history while getting the better of the younger star. </description>
